name: Cheer Time Enterprise Co., Ltd
summary: Cheer Time Enterprise Co., Ltd manufactures and sells printed circuit boards in Taiwan. The company offers high density interconnect, teflon, ceramics, load board, aluminum single/double layer, and rigid-flex boards, as well as special process products, such as copper plated on board edges, wafer test boards, countersink/counterbore holes, plated castellated holes, and VIA IN/ON PAD. Its products are used in various industries, such as GPSs, LEDs, light bars, load boards (DUT boards), IP cams, industrial PCs, etc. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
